mermaidSyntax:
gantt
  title 24-Month Multi-Site Clinical Study Timeline
  dateFormat YYYY-MM
  axisFormat %b

  section Phase 1 - Preparation
    IRB Approval :p1, 2024-01, 2M
    Site Selection & Training :p2, 2024-02, 2M
    Database Setup :p3, 2024-03, 2M

  section Phase 2 - Enrollment
    Site 1 Enrollment (M4-M8) :e1, 2024-04, 4M
    Site 2 Enrollment (M5-M10) :e2, 2024-05, 5M
    Site 3 Enrollment (M6-M12) :e3, 2024-06, 6M

  section Phase 3 - Treatment
    Treatment Period (M8-M16) :t1, 2024-08, 8M
    3-Month Follow-up (M16-M20) :t2, 2025-04, 4M

  section Phase 4 - Analysis
    Data Lock :milestone, dl, 2025-06, 0d
    Statistical Analysis (M18-M21) :a1, 2025-06, 3M
    Manuscript Prep (M21-M23) :a2, 2025-09, 2M
    Submission :milestone, sub, 2025-12, 0d

  section Key Milestones
    DSMB Review 1 (M8) :milestone, d1, 2024-08, 0d
    DSMB Review 2 (M12) :milestone, d2, 2024-12, 0d
    DSMB Review 3 (M16) :milestone, d3, 2025-04, 0d
